title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
